title: Dar Es
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Dar}}
{{Image}}
'''''Dar Es''''' was a group of three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

During [[Operation Skyhook]], while the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was looking for the location of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] proposed that the destruction of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] repair dock above [[Kalla VII]] may leave an Imperial ship stranded and vulnerable to capture by the Rebels. Dodonna's plan worked and the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Priam (starship)|''Priam'']] became stranded at the destroyed repair dock.

The Empire moved quickly to protect the stranded vessel, dispatching ''Dar Es'' group to guard it. ''Dar Es I'' and ''Dar Es II'' were already in position when the Rebels launched an attack to eliminate the escort. Two [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] were to engage the ''Priam's'' [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]] while two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], led by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], were to destroy the corvettes with their [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].

By the time ''Dar Es III'' arrived, accompanying a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] carrying supplies and personnel, the Rebels had already destroyed one of the corvettes. The two remaining corvettes were destroyed, as was the transport before the Rebels withdrew leaving only a [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]] and a handful of [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]] to defend the ''Priam''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
